title: Contact EOLakeWatch - Canada.ca
content:
## EOLakeWatch: Contact us
Your comments are important to us, we will address them as quickly as possible.
Contact us for more information, request alternate formats of the content, and report a problem or mistake on these pages.
Environment and Climate Change Canada Water Science and Technology Directorate
Email: EOLakeWatch@ec.gc.ca
- Remote sensing of algal blooms
- Interactive algal bloom monitoring tool
- Annual algal bloom summary reports
- Frequently asked questions
- Subscribe for updates

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
